description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the Auto-DevOps template and defines a hidden .auto-deploy job that runs before the deployment stage. In its before_script it sets SLUG based on CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG and CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, truncates it to 53 characters, exports KUBE_NAMESPACE=default, CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG, CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME and CI_ENVIRONMENT_URL using KUBE_INGRESS_BASE_DOMAIN; then changes to $CI_PROJECT_DIR, runs /build/bin/auto-deploy download_chart; edits chart/values.yaml to replace ingress.class "nginx" with "traefik" and removes secretName lines from chart/templates/ingress.yaml; downloads ingressroute.yml into chart/templates; and replaces the Helm template name in chart/templates/{ingress,service}.yaml. The pipeline uses the default Auto-DevOps Docker image, disables code quality and performance checks, disables PostgreSQL, and adds "--no-cache=true --network=host" to the Docker build via AUTO_DEVOPS_BUILD_IMAGE_EXTRA_ARGS. The included Auto-DevOps template provides the standard stages (build, test, review, production) and deploys the Helm chart to a Kubernetes cluster using the generated environment variables.
